title: hieracium poliophyllum
intro: Hieracium poliophyllum, also known as the Mountain Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Mountain Hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Mountain Hawkweed can be used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
